narrative:
Hopewell Twp township has 736 registered voters, with 48.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.2 percentage points.
